name: Bulk email from Sheets: read recipients, send personalized Gmail
description: Reads recipient data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet, uses Claude AI to generate personalized email content for each recipient, sends individual emails via Gmail in a loop, and posts a completion summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Send multiple emails in Gmail directly via Google Sheets

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for reading recipients

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status notification

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for send status notification

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL with recipient data (expected columns: Name, Email, Subject, Message or template fields)

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name containing recipient data

emailTemplate.description: Email template or purpose description. Use {name}, {company} as placeholders, or describe what the email should say.

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for email generation from Sheets data
Run Claude AI to generate personalized emails
Send personalized emails via Gmail loop
